items.title: Memory-only Socratic session seed
evidence: npm pack --ignore-scripts + clean temporary install smoke test
POSIX npm-bin symlink invocation regression check
acceptance: begin preserves read-only discovery and requires explicit consent before a verification call
after a verified existing inference path, collect preferred name and first objective
print a bounded memory-only mirror without filesystem or installation mutation
negative language wins over positive language in mixed consent
package-local and packed-artifact tests pass without live credentials
the installed npm bin entrypoint executes correctly through a POSIX symlink

notes: Ambiguous requests containing politeness tokens such as 'Please explain the charge first' are interpreted as affirmative consent and can trigger a provider call.
Help incorrectly claims credential values are never transmitted even though direct-provider verification sends them in the Authorization header after consent.
Tests do not exercise the interaction boundary with a fake verification runner, so denial, ambiguity, failed verification, and post-verification prompting order are not proved.
The pull-request branch is behind current main and unmergeable; refetch or rebase before renewed review.

items.title: Explicit apply and rollback authority gates

invariants: Canonical item status and dispatch live only in docs/ledger/backlog.json; this file preserves campaign design and acceptance detail.
Do not modify packages/create-workframe, apps, services, infra, or existing runtime behavior.
Do not read or print credential values.
Do not overwrite, adopt, or mutate an existing setup without an explicit immutable plan approval.
Do not use a Workframe-hosted or implicit cloud fallback.
Publication remains a separate reviewed release decision.
